meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't collaborate (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't collaborate. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Collaboration Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with design silos. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline AI-driven design workflows and scale your freelance output.
content.answer_block: To overcome collaboration friction, treat design as code. By integrating Antigravity for rapid UI prototyping and Claude Code for automated iteration, you create a 'single source of truth' repository. This enables asynchronous feedback loops, allowing you to ship high-fidelity, client-ready designs faster without constant manual design hand-off bottlenecks.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is a graveyard of abandoned projects, buried under the weight of misaligned expectations and fragmented design-to-development handoffs. You know the feeling: weeks spent iterating on static mockups while your client stares at a screen, unable to grasp the interactive potential, leading to endless rounds of scope creep.

But the tide is turning. By shifting from static design to AI-augmented, code-native workflows, you reclaim control of your timeline. This isn't just about faster output; it's about building a living, breathing collaborative engine that turns abstract client requirements into production-ready interfaces in record time.

steps.title: Define the Design System Structure
steps.description: Establish a base design system as code to ensure consistency across the project lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular Tailwind CSS configuration and a base 'design-system.json' file that defines color palettes, typography, and spacing scales for a modern SaaS dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create project structure with design-system.json in root'

steps.title: Rapid UI Prototyping
steps.description: Convert abstract client requirements into functional UI components using Antigravity's rapid generation capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity React component for a multi-step user onboarding flow using the established design system tokens. Ensure responsive layout and accessibility standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding-flow.tsx using components from current design system'

steps.title: Implement Asynchronous Feedback Loop
steps.description: Use Claude Code to document design decisions directly within the codebase, allowing clients to review logic rather than just pixels.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README.md section that outlines the component hierarchy and the rationale for the chosen UI patterns, formatted for non-technical stakeholders.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update documentation with current component architecture and rationale'

steps.title: Automated State Management
steps.description: Bridge the gap between design and functionality by automating state logic via AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Zod schema and a corresponding React hook for managing global state in the onboarding flow, ensuring type safety between the UI and the data layer.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate state-management logic for onboarding-flow.tsx'

steps.title: Production-Ready Deployment
steps.description: Finalize the build and prepare the repository for client handover.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and generate a deployment-ready build script that minimizes bundle size.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run audit and optimize build configuration'

pro_tips: Always commit your AI-generated code in atomic, feature-specific branches to allow for surgical rollbacks.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command on every generated file to enforce your specific coding standards before merging.
Treat the 'antigravity_prompt' as a living library; store successful prompts in a project-specific Notion doc for instant reuse.
Inject client feedback directly into the Claude Code context window to ensure the AI 'learns' the client's specific aesthetic preferences.
Maintain a 'style-guide.md' file that Claude Code can reference; it forces the AI to stay within your brand boundaries during iteration.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin integrating automated testing (Playwright/Jest) into your Claude Code routine to ensure your AI-generated designs never break in production.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the handoff process and start shipping like a top-tier engineering firm. By automating your design-to-code pipeline, you don't just save time—you become an indispensable partner to your clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
